footer.tagline: Twelve years on the island and over three thousand cars sold to happy owners.

hero.headline: Carefully selected cars. Exceptional condition.
hero.sub: Quality you can see. Service you can trust.

inspection.label: Checks per car
inspection.body: Every car goes through a full written inspection before it goes on sale. Nothing skipped, nothing hidden.

history.label: On the island
history.body: We've been buying and selling cars in Cyprus since 2013. We know the market and the cars.

customers.label: Happy owners
customers.body: From first-time buyers in Strovolos to families in Limassol and Paphos. Many come back when it's time for the next car.

return.label: Return policy
return.body: Take it home for a week. If it's not the right car for you, bring it back. Simple as that.

featured.title: Available right now.
featured.sub: Our stock changes every week. What you see here is exactly what's on the lot today — no bait-and-switch.

one.title: Tell us what you're looking for
one.body: Give us a call, send a WhatsApp, or fill in the form. We'll let you know what we have, what's coming in, and whether it's worth waiting.

two.title: Come and see the car
two.body: Visit the showroom, take a test drive, and check the full history. Bring your own mechanic if you'd like — we always recommend it.

three.title: Drive it home
three.body: We sort the paperwork in an afternoon. Trade-ins, financing, and delivery anywhere on the island — all handled by us.

categories.title: Find the right type for you

wall.title: What our customers say
wall.sub: These are real people who bought a car from us. No fake reviews, no paid testimonials.

cta.title: In Limassol? Come say hello.
cta.sub: We're open six days a week. It's always better to see a car in person than to read another spec sheet online.

cars.title: Our cars
cars.sub: Every car we have available right now.

filters.title: Filter
filters.results: {count, plural, =0 {No cars match} =1 {1 car} other {# cars}}

empty.title: No cars match your filters.
empty.sub: Try widening the price range or removing the brand filter.

carDetail.inquireSub: Send us a quick message — we usually reply within the hour.
carDetail.soldNotice: This car has been sold. Get in touch — we likely have something similar coming in soon.

fields.name: Your name
fields.messagePlaceholder: Trade-in, financing, mileage, anything else — let us know.

inquiry.consent: I'd like to be contacted about this car.

success.title: Thanks! We'll be in touch soon.
success.body: We've received your message and will get back to you during business hours.

error.title: Something went wrong.
error.body: Please try again, or just give us a call — we'd rather hear from you than miss your message.

hero.headline: A simple, hassle-free way to sell your car.
hero.sub: We'll give you a fair offer in 24 hours, pay you the same day, and take care of all the paperwork. No classifieds, no time-wasters, no haggling at your door.

midCta.title: Ready to sell?
midCta.sub: WhatsApp or call us — we reply within the hour.

pitch.title: Why sell to us instead of advertising privately

speed.title: Days, not months
speed.body: Selling privately usually takes six to eight weeks. With us, it's three to five days from inspection to bank transfer.

fair.title: A fair, honest price
fair.body: Our offer is based on what your car is actually worth in today's market. We'll show you exactly how we worked out the number.

clean.title: All the paperwork sorted
clean.body: Title transfer, road tax, insurance cancellation — we handle every form so you don't waste a day at the registry.

one.label: Day 1
one.title: Send us the details
one.body: Tell us about your car. Photos help, but they're not required.

two.label: Day 1–2
two.title: First offer
two.body: We'll get back with an estimated price within 24 hours, based on what you've told us.

three.label: Day 3–4
three.title: Inspection
three.body: We come to you, or you come to us. The inspection takes around twenty minutes.

four.label: Day 5
four.title: Final offer & payment
four.body: Bank transfer the same day. We take care of all the paperwork.

form.title: Tell us about your car
form.sub: The more details you share, the more accurate our estimate will be.

fields.askingHelp: Optional. We'll come back to you with our own offer either way.
fields.name: Your name
fields.notesPlaceholder: Service history, modifications, accident history, lease — anything that's relevant.

hero.headline: Drop by — we'd love to meet you in person.
hero.sub: Our showroom is in central Limassol.

whatsapp.label: WhatsApp
whatsapp.help: The fastest way to reach us

email.label: Email
email.help: Replies within an hour on weekdays

form.title: Or send us a message
form.sub: We'll get back to you during business hours, usually within an hour.

team.title: The people you'll talk to
team.sub: When you call or visit, you'll speak to a real person — never a chatbot.

hero.headline: Cyprus's most carefully selected lineup of premium cars.
hero.sub: Twelve years of buying and selling on the island. Around forty cars in stock at any given time — every one chosen, inspected, and approved by us before it goes on the floor.

founder.title: The brothers behind Auto Cyprus
founder.body: We built Auto Cyprus from the ground up — one car at a time, one customer at a time. Twelve years and three thousand customers later, that's still the standard we hold ourselves to. Every car we sell is one we'd be happy to drive home — and if a car doesn't meet that bar, it doesn't go on our lot.

honest.title: Full transparency on every car
honest.body: We document every detail — including the imperfections. Our walk-around video shows the small chip on the bumper too. We'd rather lose a sale than have you find a surprise on the day you collect.

small.title: Quality over quantity
small.body: We choose to keep our stock around forty cars, not two hundred. That's how we can personally vouch for every single one of them.

longterm.title: Customers for life
longterm.body: Most of our customers come back when it's time for the next car, or send a friend or relative. That kind of loyalty is the foundation of our business.

one.title: Founded in Limassol
one.body: Viacheslav opened the first showroom in Strovolos with seven cars and a clear vision: be the most trusted dealer on the island.

two.title: Moved to our current showroom
two.body: Relocated to a larger space at ..., Limassol, with room for forty cars and a dedicated service bay.

three.title: Island-wide delivery
three.body: Started delivering across the island — Limassol, Larnaca, Paphos and Famagusta — same-day where possible.

four.title: Three thousandth car sold
four.body: A Tesla Model 3, sold to a returning customer in Limassol. Ten years of careful work paying off.

five.title: The standard for premium cars in Cyprus.
five.body: Around forty cars on the lot. About eight people on the team. The same standards as day one.

default.title: Auto Cyprus — Quality cars in Limassol
default.description: A small, family-run car dealer in Limassol, Cyprus. Around forty quality cars in stock at a time, fully inspected, with delivery across the island.

cars.title: Our cars — Auto Cyprus
cars.description: Browse our current selection of quality cars in Cyprus. Filter by brand, body type, fuel, and price.

sell.title: Sell your car — Auto Cyprus
sell.description: Sell your car directly to Auto Cyprus. Fair offer in 24 hours, paid on the spot, all paperwork handled.

contact.title: Contact — Auto Cyprus
contact.description: Visit our showroom in Limassol, or get in touch by phone, WhatsApp, or email.

about.title: About — Auto Cyprus
about.description: Twelve years selling quality cars in Cyprus. Around forty cars at a time, just the way we like it.
